content_body: At our Public Safety Trainer Retreat we experienced many "AHA" moments at this amazing getaway. Many discussions took place while viewing the spectacular sunsets from the porch. We visited Fall Branch Falls and the waterfalls were incredibly beautiful. Visiting the Swinging Bridge was awesome - spectacular view and easy hike. We love your home and the warmth it provided us on this memorable trip. Thank you so much! ~ Florida and New York
title: Best Business Retreat Ever
